name: Bacardi Chocolate Rum Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour two 9-inch cake pans.
3. In a large bowl, combine the first six ingredients. Blend well, then beat on medium for 2 minutes.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared cake pans.
5. Bake for 30 minutes, or until done. Set aside to cool completely before frosting.
6. In a chilled bowl, mix the remaining four ingredients. Mix well, then beat on high speed (whip cream) until light and fluffy.
7. Cut each layer horizontally and frost.
This recipe was from a Bacardi bottle in the 1970s. I think it's too much rum, but then I am not a rum drinker. Do NOT SERVE TO CHILDREN!
